name: beta-booking
description: BETA Universal Booking Platform - Production-grade SaaS booking ecosystem

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run build:backend" "npm run build:user" "npm run build:admin"
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend-api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd backend-api && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend-api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --workspace=backend-api" "npm run lint --workspace=frontend-user" "npm run lint --workspace=frontend-admin"
